title: Add line item
trainOnlyReason: Arithmetic synthetic examples must not enter validation.
expectedEffect: Adds an observed non-taxable produce item and reconciles the payment total.
reviewFocus: The inserted produce row should match Sprouts body text and row spacing.
The grand total and tender line should look naturally restamped, not pasted.
Thermal noise should not damage decimal points or product text.

title: Remove line item
trainOnlyReason: Arithmetic synthetic examples must not enter validation.
expectedEffect: Removes a real observed produce item and balances the grand total.
reviewFocus: The removed line gap should preserve natural row rhythm.
The subtotal/payment edits should not create darker or sharper text patches.
Footer and barcode spacing should still read as one continuous receipt.

title: Address hard negative
trainOnlyReason: Synthetic examples target known model confusions and must not enter validation.
expectedEffect: Improve ADDRESS_LINE precision with one high-fidelity O hard negative.
reviewFocus: The synthetic address-like hard negative should not look visually boxed-in.
Header/body style transitions should match the real merchant receipt.
The image should remain legible enough for human review despite thermal texture.
